info.description: Home single type. DEPRECATED fields (suyai-back#25, kept until FE migration then removed): `cards` -> replaced by the `destinations` relation; `contactForm` -> replaced by the `footer` single type contact fields consumed by the FE contact section (villa-tour#59); `footer` component -> redundant with the `footer` single type.

cards.description: DEPRECATED (suyai-back#25): wrong model for home tiles. Replaced by the `destinations` relation. Kept until FE migration, then remove.

contactForm.description: DEPRECATED (suyai-back#25): replaced by the `footer` single type contact fields consumed by the FE contact section (villa-tour#59). Dedicated contactSection component intentionally not built (suyai-back#22). Kept until FE migration, then remove.

footer.description: DEPRECATED (suyai-back#25): redundant with the `footer` single type. Kept until FE migration, then remove.
